creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to freebsd from comment #4)

Automated processes cannot ensure that the updated port actually works fine.  To do that, you need to test the software after updating it.  I hope you're doing so, are you?

Note that this update added some garbage to sysutils/topgrade/Makefile.crates.
It's surprising that it seems to build despite there being garbage in the file.
Please make sure you manually review all patches you submit for correctness before you submit them.  Otherwise you're just wasting people's time.

... and this sort of stuff is why you can't update your ports with a cron job.
